original: With internal volume the most valuable commodity in space, laying out large sums of capital in order to maximize crew space has become a common practice. Advanced quarters utilize space-saving technologies to minimize a crew member’s volumetric footprint while providing creature comforts to rival a high-end hotel.\n\n(+1 bonus crew capacity)
